mapper.sql: a.id, a.type, a.label, a.value, a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.create_by AS "createUserId", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.update_by AS "updateUserId", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.select: SELECT type FROM sys_dict GROUP BY type ORDER BY type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict(id, value, label, type, priority, remarks, create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by, del_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{value}, #{label}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{createUserId}, #{updateDate}, #{updateUserId}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict SET value = #{value}, label = #{label}, type = #{type}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate}, update_by = #{updateUserId}, del_flag = #{delFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
